title: Crunchy Spicy Mediterranean Parsley Stir-fry
description: A cozy mediterranean dish featuring freshly chopped parsley, pickled vegetables, and a spicy kick for a jain-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Pickled Vegetables (e.g., Gochujang pickles)
ingredients.notes: Use vegetarian-friendly brands or make your own with non-animal ingredients.

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and red pepper flakes, cooking until fragrant and slightly golden.
Stir in chopped parsley and pickled vegetables. Cook for about 1 minute to combine flavors.
Pour in tomato sauce and stir well to combine all ingredients.
Reduce heat to low, cover the pan and let simmer for another 2-3 minutes.
Serve hot as a snack or light meal.
